title: Income Tax Return calendar gets major reset: New filing deadlines, extended revision window for taxpayers
summary: Taxpayers filing ITR-1 and ITR-2 must submit their returns by 31 July. Meanwhile, taxpayers filing ITR-3 or ITR-4 who are not subject to tax audit can now file their returns until 31 August, an additional month beyond the traditional deadline.

title: mAadhaar App discontinued: Here's everything to know about the new Aadhaar app
summary: The Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI) has announced that the mAadhaar App will be discontinued from today, 30 June. The new Aadhaar App is designed to offer Aadhaar Number Holders (ANHs) a secure and paperless way to access Aadhaar services.&nbsp;

title: I-T dept flags up to 20,000 ITRs for ‘swapped provisions’ used to lower net tax liability — What happens next?
summary: The income tax department has identified 15,000-20,000 cases of taxpayers using swapped provisions to reduce taxable income. This involves replacing exemptions to lower tax liability without valid reasons and documents. Details here.

title: No restriction on buying petrol and diesel from July 1? Here's what changes
summary: The Indian government will lift restrictions on petrol and diesel sales starting July 1, following an improvement in fuel supplies. The move indicates stability in fuel distribution and supply in India, as per the Centre.&nbsp;

title: 10 reasons why Nomura stays bullish on Bharti Airtel, sees 28% upside
summary: Nomura has named Bharti Airtel its top telecom pick, raising its target price to Rs 2,355 and calling it an 'ARPU compounder'. The brokerage highlighted the company's strong free cash flow generation, potential tariff hikes, and growth in its data centers, Airtel Money, and African businesses.

title: Vedanta Iron & Steel shares extend winning streak, surge 10%; stock up 70% since listing
summary: Vedanta Iron & Steel shares jumped, extending an 11-day winning streak and taking total gains to over 70% since listing earlier this month. The stock debuted at Rs 20 following Vedanta Group’s demerger and has nearly doubled its market cap to about Rs 13,941 crore from Rs 7,821 crore.

summary: China's central bank significantly boosted liquidity, injecting 600 billion yuan via overnight reverse repos, doubling Monday's debut. title: Aastha Spintex IPO Day 2: GMP signals 4% listing gain; subscription nears full. Should you apply?
summary: Aastha Spintex's Rs 170 crore IPO entered Day 2 with a 4% grey market premium (GMP), indicating a potential listing around Rs 141 versus the upper issue price of Rs 136. The IPO saw a steady start, with the issue 88% subscribed on Day 1.
